productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Breakline Track Pants
description: Style Note Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these Nike track pants come in a body-friendly design and keep you sweat-free and fresh all day. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets for superior style. Product Details Black full-length track pants, has an elasticated waist with drawstrings, two side pockets, back pocket with velcro closure, toggle straps at the hem, branding at the back and left leg Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on print/decoration
